ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "internal_reference" TEXT /* Internal reference code for the product */,
  "can_be_expensed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the product can be expensed */,
  "can_be_purchased" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the product can be purchased */,
  "can_be_sold" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the product can be sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the product */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the product */,
  "supply_method" TEXT /* Method of supplying the product (e.g., Buy, Make to Stock) */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., Stockable Product, Consumable, Service) */,
  "procurement_method" TEXT /* Procurement method for the product (e.g., Make to Stock, Buy) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the product */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type FOREIGN KEY ("product_type") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_procurement_method FOREIGN KEY ("procurement_method") REFERENCES procurement_methods ("procurement_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supply_method FOREIGN KEY ("supply_method") REFERENCES supply_methods ("supply_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "preferred" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the supplier is preferred */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery in days */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity */,
  "max_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum order quantity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  "last_checked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was last checked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the warehouse in square meters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warehouse was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warehouse was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was created */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase order (e.g., pending, approved, received) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase order */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the purchase order */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the purchase order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_lines" (
  "order_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order line */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "line_total" REAL /* Total amount for the line item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the line item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_lines_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_lines_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the sales order was created */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sales order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sales order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the sales order */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sales order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_order_lines" (
  "order_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales order line */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "line_total" REAL /* Total amount for the line item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the line item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales order line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales order line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_lines_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_lines_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES sales_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product related to the expense */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "expense_type" TEXT /* Type of the expense (e.g., purchase, maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the expense */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category for the expense */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement_methods" (
  "procurement_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement method */,
  "procurement_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the procurement method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the procurement method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procurement_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_methods" (
  "supply_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply method */,
  "supply_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the supply method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supply method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
